commands.review_summary:
The branch adds opt-in Slack approval QA scenarios, Mantis Slack desktop approval-checkpoint rendering/workflow controls, docs/tests, and a Slack native plugin approval account-scope fix.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a QA feature PR, not a bug report. The relevant verification path is the live Mantis Slack desktop approval-checkpoints run plus source review of the workflow/runtime changes.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer review for the protected label, latest-head proof, rendered-checkpoint QA contract, and secret-bearing workflow boundary; no narrow automatable code defect was found.

target.title: Add Slack approval QA checkpoints
target.body:
## Summary
- Add Slack live QA scenarios for native exec and plugin approval prompts, resolved updates, and approval artifact reporting.
- Add Mantis Slack desktop `--approval-checkpoints` mode with pending/resolved screenshot handshakes and artifact validation.
- Render approval checkpoint screenshots from Slack API-observed approval messages so the required proof is not the unauthenticated Slack Web sign-in page.
- Document Slack approval QA scenarios and Mantis checkpoint usage.

Mantis option notes: `--approval-checkpoints` adds the approval-specific proof mode that waits for native Slack exec/plugin approval pending and resolved states, then renders required screenshots from the observed Slack API messages so CI is not blocked by Slack Web sign-in. `--market` lets the workflow request stable AWS on-demand desktop capacity for these long live runs, and `--fresh-pr` makes the remote Crabbox VM run the current PR checkout instead of relying on a pre-synced GitHub Actions worktree.

## Verification
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/slack/slack-live.runtime.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/slack/slack-live.runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/mantis/cli.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/mantis/cli.runtime.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/mantis/slack-desktop-smoke.runtime.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/mantis/slack-desktop-smoke.runtime.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/slack/slack-live.runtime.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/mantis/slack-desktop-smoke.runtime.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/cli.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/mantis/slack-desktop-smoke.runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/slack/slack-live.runtime.test.ts`
- `pnpm docs:list | rg -i "qa|mantis|slack"`
- `python3 /Users/kevinlin/.codex/skills/specy/scripts/validate_flow_doc.py --kind flow-doc --doc /Users/kevinlin/code/openclaw/.mem/main/flows/slack-approval-qa-checkpoints.md`
- `node scripts/generate-npm-shrinkwrap.mjs --all --check` against the committed workspace manifest
- `node scripts/run-bundled-extension-oxlint.mjs`
- GitHub Actions Mantis Slack Desktop Smoke run 26301377905: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26301377905

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Slack QA can deterministically request native exec and plugin approvals with exec approvals enabled, assert Slack Block Kit approval actions, resolve each approval, verify the resolved Slack update, and publish required pending/resolved approval checkpoint screenshots.
Real environment tested: GitHub Actions `Mantis Slack Desktop Smoke` against AWS Crabbox desktop provider, Convex Slack QA credentials, live OpenAI model config, and the real Slack QA transport.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: Dispatched `Mantis Slack Desktop Smoke` for `candidate_ref=codex/slack-qa-approval-scenarios`, `scenario_id=approval-checkpoints`, `approval_checkpoints=true`, `crabbox_provider=aws`, `crabbox_market=on-demand`, and `hydrate_mode=source`.
Evidence after fix: Run 26301377905 passed on current head `4cdef44c2f77ce8460d41fe4f99fa8295ccf471d`; artifacts include required inline screenshots for `slack-approval-exec-native` pending/resolved and `slack-approval-plugin-native` pending/resolved under `approval-checkpoints/`. Artifact: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26301377905/artifacts/7166460983. Raw files: https://artifacts.openclaw.ai/mantis/slack-desktop-smoke/pr-85141/run-26301377905-1/index.json.
Observed result after fix: Slack QA passed both approval checkpoint scenarios; exec and plugin approvals produced native pending and resolved checkpoints, and Mantis evidence marked all four approval checkpoint screenshots inline and required.
What was not tested: A human-authenticated Slack Web session screenshot was not used as required evidence; the required screenshots are rendered from Slack API messages observed by QA so the proof is independent of Slack Web login state.
target.author: kevinslin

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
